title: Cross-Input Signature Aggregation (CISA)
description: CISA aggregates signatures across multiple inputs to reduce weight and improve coordination efficiency. It introduces new accounting and policy considerations for batch spenders.

resources.title: BTC Transcripts: cross-input-signature-aggregation
resources.notes: Debates around fee savings and safety assumptions.
